name: Ramp Truck & Bus Ctr
fmcsa_address: Port Jefferson Station, NY (per dealer records)
inc_date: 1946 (Ramp Motors Inc, Ford franchise per company history); Ramp Chevrolet Inc was founded 1988
officers: Rampone family (4 generations of family ownership; founded by Alfred Rampone)
entity_status: Active (Ramp Motors / Ramp Ford operates; Ramp Chevrolet shown 'CLOSED' on Yelp)
registry_source: FMCSA SAFER (USDOT 1563522 - Ramp Motors Inc); NY DOS; company-history pages
notes: Ramp Truck & Bus Center at 1595 Route 112 is NOT a school-bus OPERATOR — it is a commercial vehicle DEALERSHIP / leasing-and-sales arm of the Rampone family auto group (Ramp Motors / Ramp Ford / former Ramp Chevrolet). They sell and service trucks and church/charter/shuttle/trolley buses but do not operate a fleet of student-transportation buses. USDOT 1563522 (Ramp Motors Inc) is INACTIVE in SAFER. This is therefore not a viable tuck-in target as a transportation operator; it could only be relevant as a fleet-vendor relationship. Should likely be excluded from the operator universe.
